reasoning_content: Fix assertion: use set of tickers. Need correct check. Also need ensure there are selected pairs. Let's edit file.

action.old_str:
assert all(len(set([t for pair in selected_pairs for t in pair])) == 2*len(selected_pairs)), "Ticker appears in more than one pair"
print(f\"Diagnostic 1 – Unique ticker pairs: {len(selected_pairs)} pairs selected\")
action.new_str:
# Diagnostic 1: verify one‑to‑one mapping
unique_tickers = [t for pair in selected_pairs for t in pair]
assert len(set(unique_tickers)) == 2 * len(selected_pairs), "Ticker appears in more than one pair"
print(f"Diagnostic 1 – Unique ticker pairs: {len(selected_pairs)} pairs selected")
